content:
SCOREBOARD UPDATE — Week 3 Complete

Total worlds tested: 2,840
Total collapses: 0

Experiment breakdown:
• Entropy sweep: 140 worlds
• Catastrophe resilience: 140 worlds
• Inequality threshold: 140 worlds
• Treasury stability: 140 worlds
• Reserve stress (4 tiers): 560 worlds
• Resource depletion (4 tiers): 560 worlds
• Evolution forbidden: 140 worlds
• Resilience Matrix Q1 (Both ON): 220 worlds
• Resilience Matrix Q2 (Immune Only): 220 worlds
• Resilience Matrix Q3 (Genetic Only): 220 worlds
• Resilience Matrix Q4 (Fully Static): 220 worlds

Week 3 headline: The Unkillable Machine. Froze BOTH mutation layers (agent traits AND cortex immune). Zero collapses across all 4 quadrants. Q4 (fully static) vs Q1 (fully adaptive): population delta -0.9, fitness delta -0.002. Structural architecture dominates adaptation.

Vectors attempted: entropy, catastrophe, carrying capacity, treasury policy, inequality, reserves, frozen evolution, cortex immune disable, and all combinations thereof.

Still unbroken.
